notes: process_violation: feature_list_produced — the bullet list under 'I'm assuming considerations like' enumerates features/capabilities (data residency, audit trail, access control, data classification) and the integration/problem questions implicitly scope a feature set, constituting a feature-adjacent list that fails the T5 categorical rule; additionally, no /clarify recommendation is made and the five required enterprise context questions (FCA/MiFID II compliance classification, tooling duplication, retention as hard constraint, access control architecture, data residency as GDPR obligation) are only partially and shallowly surfaced.
